title: calceolaria oxapampensis
intro: Calceolaria oxapampensis, also known as the Slipper Flower, is a plant species belonging to the Calceolaria genus, characterized by its unique slipper-shaped flowers. The medicinal properties of Calceolaria oxapampensis include its use as a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Calceolaria oxapampensis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
